title: 473ml (16 OZ MAX) White Opal Glass Cereal Bowl Set of 6, 6.5 inch Dishwasher & Microwave Safe Round Bowls for Soup, Salad and Rice

Food Grade Materials: Our opal glass materials of cereal bowls are lead-free, cadmium-free, and BPA-free
Matte-bottom Design: Prevents slipping and sliding. Offers a pleasant tactile experience when handling

Durable and Lightweight: Look as good as new even after numerous washes; The bottom is treated with frosted anti-slip; Easier handling; Save energy in production and transportation
Space Saving: Stackable, can be neatly placed in the cupboard to save more space in your kitchen; A great gift ideal for home décor, housewarming, wedding, family reunion or any other party
High Resistance to Scratches: Maintains a pristine appearance over time, even with frequent use
100% Recyclable: Recycle our soup bowls according to your local recycling guidelines; Recycling glass helps reduce landfill waste, contributing to a more sustainable
Our Commitment: Our unwavering commitment is to deliver premium, environmentally responsible products to our customers
Our Service: We're committed to a great customer experience; Any questions or concerns about our bowl set; Contact our customer service; Your satisfaction is our priority

Opal glass is a kind of glass product. It has high transparency and glossiness, and its surface is smooth. Because of its beautiful appearance, it can enhance the grade of dining. Moreover, it is relatively easy to clean. Why the bottom is not smooth like the surface? Because our products has matte-bottom design which prevents slipping and sliding on smooth surfaces. It offers a pleasant tactile experience when handling. Elevates everyday dining with both practical and aesthetic improvements. Why they are more lightweight and thinner than porcelain? The material is glass not clay, so it is more lightweight and very durable for using. Stronger than porcelain. Is it easy broken? It is tougher than ordinary glass and not easy to break. Is it suitable for more places? It can withstand certain temperature changes.
